channel.title: Crimp Weekly
channel.description: Fresh takes for indoor boulderers and new climbers.

item.title: The state of Technique in 2026
item.description: A field report on technique: where things stand, and what indoor boulderers and new climbers should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Training without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to training for indoor boulderers and new climbers — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "bouldering technique for beginners" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "bouldering technique for beginners" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why indoor boulderers are rethinking Gear
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how indoor boulderers and new climbers approach gear — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Recovery on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in recovery — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Training: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping training for indoor boulderers and new climbers.
